title: Out Of Death
desc: From the producers of The Irishman & Lone Survivor comes this thrilling story of Jack Harris (Bruce Willis) who must tap into his killer instincts to survive the wilderness and the human predators as he tries to help a woman who witnesses a crime and finds herself running from a rural mountain town's corrupt police department after she took a video of police killing a drug dealer.

title: The Good Boss
desc: What makes a Good Boss? Is your boss good? Manipulative? Shamelessly meddles in his employees private lives? Crosses every line imaginable. The Good Boss is a biting character study with academy award winner Javier Bardem. To win the competition, the manipulative "good boss" unknowingly starts an explosive chain reaction with wild consequences.

title: Untraceable
desc: A FBI secret service agent, gets caught in a deadly cat-and-mouse game with a serial killer who knows that people will log onto an "untraceable" website where he conducts violent and painful murders LIVE on the net. The more people who log on and enter the website, the quicker and more violently the victim dies.

title: Universal Soldier: Regeneration
desc: Terrorists kidnap the Russian Prime Minister's two kids, take Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant and threaten to blow up a reactor. Four Universal Soldiers go in but are no match to a Next Generation UniSol. The world's only hope is to reactivate decommissioned Universal Soldier Luc Deveraux.

title: The Catcher Was A Spy
desc: With an ensemble cast, this gripping, espionage thriller brings to life the true story of Moe Berg a World War II spy. His mission: go behind enemy lines in Europe to assassinate the Nazi's chief nuclear scientist before the Germans develop an atomic bomb. Berg must rely on his steel-trap intellect in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse - with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.

title: Jurassic Hunt
desc: In this pulse-pounding Creature thriller, Female adventurer Parker joins a crew of male trophy hunters in a remote wilderness park. Their goal: slaughter genetically recreated dinosaurs & must work together to evade the giant human-hungry creatures and mercenaries hired to finish them off. This battle's about to become primitive.
